PersonaPanel.title: My Persona Panels
PersonaPanel.subtitle: Manage and reuse your persona groups for discussions and interviews

ListPage.createNewPanelDescription: Start a new discussion to create a reusable persona panel
ListPage.createDescription: Describe what kind of personas you need for your panel
ListPage.createPlaceholder: e.g., I need tech-savvy Gen Z consumers interested in sustainable fashion
ListPage.cannotDeleteUsedPanel: Cannot delete a panel that is being used in discussions or interviews
ListPage.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete Panel #{id}? This action cannot be undone.
ListPage.projectsEmptyDescription: Research projects will appear here once you create them from your panels.

DetailPage.noProjectsDescription: Start a new research project to begin analyzing with this panel
DetailPage.newProjectDescription: Describe your research question or objective
DetailPage.newProjectPlaceholder: e.g., What are the key purchasing factors for Gen Z consumers?
DetailPage.deleteProjectWarning: Delete this research project? This cannot be undone.
DetailPage.cannotDeleteProjectWithContent: Cannot delete project with existing content

ProjectDetailPage.noContentDescription: The agent is preparing. View the agent chat to see progress.

DiscussionDetailPage.artifactsPlaceholder: Reports and podcasts will appear here

CreatePanelTool.title: Select Personas
CreatePanelTool.personaCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 persona selected} other {# personas selected}}
CreatePanelTool.panelUpdated: Panel "{title}" created with {count, plural, =1 {1 persona} other {# personas}}

CreatePanelWizard.selectPersonas: Review and select personas for your panel

ResearchWizard.title: New Research
ResearchWizard.question: Research Question
ResearchWizard.questionPlaceholder: e.g., How do consumers perceive domestic beauty brands?

executing.title: Research in Progress
executing.description: Agent is executing the research, please wait...

HomePage.headline: AI Panel: Research with AI Personas
HomePage.description: Select from 300K personas, launch discussions, reuse across projects.

panelLibrary.title: Centralized Persona Library
panelLibrary.description: Manage your personal and team AI personas, and supplement from a 300K public library anytime.
panelLibrary.detail1: Import interviews / research materials to generate Personas
panelLibrary.detail3: Unified entry for 1-on-1 and group chats

panelCreation.title: Panel Composition & Reuse
panelCreation.description: Combine multiple personas into a Panel for the same research scenarios, reducing ad-hoc recruitment costs.
panelCreation.detail1: Compose Personas by scenario (e.g. urban users / core users)
panelCreation.detail2: Panel as participant pool for research projects
panelCreation.detail3: Support for reuse and version management

panelDiscussion.title: Group Discussion & Consensus
panelDiscussion.description: Launch a Panel group chat in one click, let personas discuss under the same topic to converge viewpoints quickly.
panelDiscussion.detail3: Closer to real focus group feedback structures

panelResearch.title: Research Workflow Integration
panelResearch.description: Deep integration with Study / AI Interview, making Panel the infrastructure for insight production.
panelResearch.detail3: Export discussion minutes and key points

dimensions.title: Panel Design Dimensions
dimensions.description: Build Panels from multiple dimensions to match real users and cover key research questions.

demographic.title: Demographics
demographic.description: Incorporate age, occupation, income and other demographic info so the Panel covers key segments.

geographic.title: Geography & Markets
geographic.description: Build Panels by city or region to compare feedback across different markets.

psychological.title: Motivation & Psychology
psychological.description: Construct behavior-driven Panel perspectives around motivations, attitudes and values.

behavioral.title: Behavior & Decision Paths
behavioral.description: Define Panel decision characteristics using typical behavior chains (purchase, renewal, churn).

needs.title: Needs & Pain Points
needs.description: Aggregate Personas around core needs and pain points into Panels with clear research themes.

tech.title: Tech Acceptance
tech.description: Build Panels sensitive to different product forms based on digitization level and tech acceptance.

social.title: Social Influence
social.description: Construct Panels closer to real communication chains using social roles and influence dimensions.

steps.title: From Persona to Panel Workflow
steps.description: Transform scattered personas into reusable Panel research assets with clear steps.

step1.title: Import / Select Personas
step1.description: Import interviews or search the public library to build persona assets relevant to your business.

step2.title: Compose into Panel
step2.description: Select a group of Personas by scenario (e.g. feature testing / market entry) and save as a reusable Panel.

step3.title: Launch Panel Discussion
step3.description: Let Personas in the Panel engage in multi-round group chats or structured discussions on specific questions.

step4.title: Capture Insights
step4.description: Output key insights, consensus and disagreements from Panel discussions to support decision-making.

step5.title: Reuse & Iterate
step5.description: Reuse Panels across projects and continuously optimize persona composition with new data.

cta.title: Ready to start your next research with Panel?
cta.description: Build your personas first, then use Panel to organize conversations. Whether it's product decisions, market insights, or co-creation, Panel adds context to every conversation.

InterviewsPage.title: Interviews
InterviewsPage.artifactsPlaceholder: Reports and podcasts will appear here
InterviewsPage.noInterviews: No interviews have been conducted yet
InterviewsPage.selectInterview: Select a persona to view their interview
